card_selection_drift_warning.title: Notice
card_selection_drift_warning.description:
This card's effect may change the target pile or advance RNG, so this prediction may not be accurate.
You can turn off this notice in settings.
frozen_eye.draw_pile_hover_view: Click to view the cards in your draw pile (in draw order).
transform_bundle_explanation.title: Prediction
transform_bundle_explanation.description: Each pack follows the order cards are chosen, showing all possible results when a deck card is transformed in that position.
transform_selection_selected.title: Prediction
transform_selection_unselected.title: Prediction
transform_selection_unselected.descripti: If you choose this card now, it will transform into [gold]{TransformedCard}[/gold].
